notes.backend: This project communicates with a separate Laravel backend (http://127.0.0.1:8000/api). Set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL in .env.local to point to your backend.
notes.testing: Run tests with 'npm test' (Jest) or 'npm run test:ui' (Playwright E2E)
notes.build: Production build: 'npm run build' followed by 'npm start'
